title: Scissors, Stainless Steel Blades, Soft Grip Handle, Suitable for Households,Offices and Schools, Blue/Grey, 4 pcs/Pack
features: Product information: The blades of these sharp scissors are made of 2cr13 stainless steel with hardness three times that of ordinary stainless steel. The handle is composed of premium ABS and rubber. Sizes: 5.5", 6.5", 8.5", and 10".
Sharp and durable: The premium stainless steel blades with sharp cutters, can easily cut papers. The blades are securely embedded in the handle to avoid separations and handle damages.

Considerate design: The blades are fixed with high-strength stainless steel nails for easy operation and comfortable grip. The ergonomic soft handle can help you easily cut the shapes you want and save your strength.
Extensive uses: Can be used as household scissors, office scissors, kitchen scissors, fabric scissors, school scissors, etc.
Quality Assurance:We are committed to providing high-quality products. If you are not 100% satisfied, we will refund you in full.
